---
title: "Inventory Application"
subtitle: "Full Stack"
description: "An inventory management app for an imaginary store created with Express and PostgreSQL"
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-09-25
image: ../utils/inventory-application.png
categories:
  - Node.js
  - Express
  - SQL
  - PostgreSQL
  - EJS
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---


<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://inventory-application-rtuo.onrender.com/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/inventory-application" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
